items.name: riso-theme
items.title: Riso Theme
items.description: Risograph ink palette CSS variables. Installs --riso-primary/secondary/overlap/paper into :root plus four named theme overrides.
items.docs: Add data-riso-theme="pink-teal" | "red-yellow" | "blue-pink" | "black-yellow" to your <html> or any wrapper element to switch themes. Override individual vars in your own CSS: :root { --riso-primary: #yourcolor; }

items.name: riso-utils
items.title: Riso Utils
items.description: Shared resolveRisoVars() helper. Converts a theme name and/or raw color props into an inline CSS variables object. Required by all riso UI components.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Risograph-style Accordion component with ink misregistration effects. Supports named theme presets and per-instance color overrides.
items.docs: Use the theme prop for named presets: theme="blue-pink". Use primary/secondary/overlap/paper props for raw color overrides. Set data-riso-theme on a parent element for section-level theming.
